name: Baba De Moça ( Egg Coconut Custard Cream )
recipeIngredient: 1 cup coconut cream or coconut milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the sugar and water over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved. Allow it to cook until it becomes a thick syrup.
2. Sift the egg yolks through a sieve.
3. Blend the egg yolks with coconut cream and stir into the syrup in a bain marie until it coats a spoon.
4. Let cool.
5. Serve in individual bowls or on top of ice cream.
